generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually benefiting more from our defense commitments than we are? While we're spending billions to maintain our alliances, they're cutting back on their own defense budgets. It's time we prioritize our own security and ensure our allies contribute their fair share. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
